models.title: Terra Solito Waterproof Resilient Shower and Wall Panel
source_fields:
Terra Solito Waterproof Resilient Shower and Wall Panel by Pannello XL is a premium, 5mm thick panel designed for versatile installation on walls. It features a smooth finish and high gloss level, perfect for residential use in any grade level. Certified GreenGuard Gold for superior indoor air quality.

  • Light scratch resistance ensures durability, keeping your shower walls looking pristine for years.
  • Waterproof design makes it ideal for wet environments, preventing water damage and mold growth.
  • Straight edge provides a seamless look, enhancing the aesthetic appeal of your space.
  • High gloss level adds a sleek, modern touch to your bathroom decor.
  • Smooth texture offers an elegant appearance and easy maintenance.
  • Smooth finish provides a polished look that is easy to clean and maintain.
  • Glue-down installation method ensures a secure fit, making it a reliable choice for your walls.
  • Non-abrasive sponge or cloth cleaning method keeps the panels looking new without damaging the surface.
  • Backed by a 10-year residential warranty, offering peace of mind with your purchase.

Terra Solito Waterproof Resilient Shower and Wall Panel by Pannello XL is an excellent choice for those seeking a stylish and durable solution for their shower walls. With its high-quality features and easy maintenance, its designed to enhance any residential space.
